description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Manual build binary on Windows (x86-64) that triggers on push to the qt6 branch and allows manual dispatch. In a single windows-2022 job, check out the code, set up a build environment with MSVC, install Python 3.13, upgrade pip, and install Qt 6.7.3, numpy, PyQt6, and other required modules. Then build Veusz extensions and a binary with pyinstaller, and upload the resulting artifact named windows-binary.
